awards:
第70届柏林国际电影节(2020)
　　泰迪熊奖(提名)
　　新生代少年单元 国际评审团最佳长片(提名) 吉尔·巴罗尼
format:
[img]https://img9.doubanio.com/view/photo/l_ratio_poster/public/p2581765776.jpg[/img]

◎译　　名　爱丽丝·朱尼奥尔 / Alice Junior
◎片　　名　Alice Júnior
◎年　　代　2019
◎产　　地　巴西
◎类　　别　喜剧
◎语　　言　葡萄牙语
◎上映日期　2019-09-28(维托里亚电影节)
◎IMDb评分  6.9/10 from 645 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8217188/
◎豆瓣评分　6.8/10 from 180 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/34955864/
◎片　　长　87分钟
◎导　　演　吉尔·巴罗尼 Gil Baroni

◎简　　介  

　　Alice Júnior is trans, confident and ready to confront life. In the new school in the Brazilian province, she is first bullied and then admired. In her struggle for acceptance, her YouTube community is omnipresent, in the comments and emojis on her page, but also all throughout the visual level of the film.

◎获奖情况  

　　第70届柏林国际电影节(2020)
　　泰迪熊奖(提名)
　　新生代少年单元 国际评审团最佳长片(提名) 吉尔·巴罗尼
introduction: Alice Júnior is trans, confident and ready to confront life. In the new school in the Brazilian province, she is first bullied and then admired. In her struggle for acceptance, her YouTube community is omnipresent, in the comments and emojis on her page, but also all throughout the visual level of the film.
